plugins.name: ai-pair-programming
plugins.description: Query external LLMs (OpenAI/ChatGPT, Google Gemini, xAI Grok) for code review, improvement suggestions, and collaborative problem-solving

plugins.name: swift-binding-assistant
plugins.description: Guide users through creating .NET C# bindings for Swift iOS libraries, from SPM package or xcframework to validated NuGet package

plugins.name: smart-permissions
plugins.description: Smart autonomous permission management for Claude Code with configurable safe commands, path-based security, dangerous command blocking, and optional LLM safety evaluation fallback

plugins.name: session-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-session design doc execution using agent teams, spawning one worker per session sequentially with fresh context and optional AI pair review
